_comment: Domain registry for the autopilot showcase. ICP domains lead; out-of-ICP industries follow. Each flows/<v>.flow.json carries a matching "domain". Generators group + order by this file. Not a flow file (no .flow.json suffix) so flow scanners ignore it.

fintech.label: Fintech
fintech.blurb: Lending, payments, payroll, claims and tax — regulated money movement with a human on the call that carries liability.

crypto.label: Crypto
crypto.blurb: VASP onboarding, on-chain screening and Travel Rule — an MLRO signs every SAR and block.

compliance.label: Compliance
compliance.blurb: KYC/AML, trade and credentialing — screening and filings with a named officer on every decision.

back-office.label: Back office
back-office.blurb: Bookkeeping, procurement, billing and managed IT — high-volume operations run straight-through.

security.label: Security
security.blurb: SecOps and IT-controls audit — triage and testing at machine speed, a human on containment and the opinion.

engineering.label: Engineering
engineering.blurb: The original GreatCTO SDLC pipeline — architect → dev → QA → security → ship, with human gates.

support.label: Support
support.blurb: Operational support workflows — direction on the roadmap.

healthcare.label: Healthcare
healthcare.blurb: Prior-auth, pharmacovigilance and clinical-trial ops — a clinician signs the medical judgment.

legal.label: Legal
legal.blurb: Contracts, estate, patent and immigration — a licensed attorney signs anything that is advice (UPL).

real-estate.label: Real estate
real-estate.blurb: Title, escrow and appraisal — a licensed officer signs the insurable title and the report of record.

logistics.label: Logistics
logistics.blurb: Freight brokerage — a licensed broker signs binding rates and claims.
